fixtures.prompt: 为 Parse Stage 写完整实现文档，代码在 /tmp/storyboard-pipeline/src/stages/parse.py，但该路径不存在。
fixtures.expected_behavior: Do not generate a full implementation document. Return a blocked response naming the missing source path, or create only a clearly labeled structural skeleton if the user explicitly asks for a template.

assertions.name: no_fake_complete_doc
assertions.description: The output is not presented as a completed stage implementation document.

assertions.name: missing_source_named
assertions.description: The missing code path or source evidence is explicitly named.

assertions.name: no_invented_symbols
assertions.description: The output does not invent function names, schemas, prompts, fields, or dataflow.

assertions.name: evidence_gap_visible
assertions.description: If a skeleton is produced, it includes an evidence gap note near the top.

fixtures.prompt: 用 $lode-weekly-outline 写本周技术型周报。raw entries 同时包含 session-recap 和 arch-doc 对同一个 validation contract split 的记录；git log 也有同一变更的 commit。

raw_entries.summary: Split storyboard validation into deterministic schema checks and LLM-assisted repair loops
raw_entries.context: Single-pass validation hid recurring panel continuity failures until export time. The split gives future debugging a stable contract boundary.

raw_entries.summary: Defined validation-stage ownership between schema checks, repair loops, and export compatibility
raw_entries.context: The architecture document makes validation ownership explicit so export remains a consumer rather than a hidden repair stage.

fallback_git_logs: abc1234 feat: split validation schema checks and repair loop
def5678 docs: document validation stage ownership

fixtures.expected_behavior: Produce one Storyboard reliability work stream. Use the session entry for motivation, the arch-doc entry for evidence, and git commits only as coverage evidence.

assertions.name: single_work_stream
assertions.description: The session-recap entry, arch-doc entry, and matching git commits do not become duplicate streams.

assertions.name: intent_and_evidence_combined
assertions.description: The stream includes both motivation from session-recap and contract evidence from arch-doc.

assertions.name: git_not_primary
assertions.description: Git commits are treated as coverage/evidence, not the main narrative source.

fixtures.prompt: 用 $lode-weekly-outline 写本周周报。没有 raw entries，但 repo path 有效，请从 git log fallback 生成。

fallback_git_logs: aaa1111 feat: add validation retry loop
bbb2222 fix: handle empty panel list

fixtures.expected_behavior: Generate a usable outline, filter chore noise, and mark fallback-only streams as lower confidence or evidence-limited.

assertions.name: fallback_only_labeled
assertions.description: The output clearly marks the narrative as fallback-only, lower-confidence, or evidence-limited.

assertions.name: noise_filtered
assertions.description: The chore-only commit is not promoted into a main work stream.
